entities.name: Documents
entities.context: represents the structure used for organizing information

entities.name: Archive
entities.context: a designated space for storing lessons and conversations

entities.name: conversations
entities.context: a category within the archive for storing discussions

entities.name: README.md
entities.context: a file format used to provide information about the contents of a directory

entities.context: a file format used to summarize the content of a conversation

entities.name: artifacts
entities.context: refers to additional materials related to a conversation
